Name: Percentage of cases where Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation is immediately followed by SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Frequency of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation across all process variants
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation occurrences that are part of variants ending in SW-EIC Reject
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Number of times Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation appears before any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation events that occur in cases where SW-Reviewer Agreed eventually happens
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in variants that include at least one reminder activity (e.g., Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2)
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' occurs

Name: Percentage of all activity executions in the log that correspond to Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all cases

Name: Number of process instances containing Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation that proceed to a revision stage (e.g., SW-EIC Major Revision or SW-EIC Minor Revision)
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision' occurs

Name: Percentage of variants starting with Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation versus those starting with SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Frequency of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases that ultimately reach an acceptance decision (e.g., RW-EIC Accept or SW-EIC Accept)
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation occurrences that are followed within 24 hours by Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Number of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation events that precede a plagiarism check (Plagiarism Originality Report Completed)
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases where Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation is not followed by any checklist-related activity (e.g., SW-Checklist Completed or SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days)
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all cases where 'SW-Checklist Completed' does not happen

Name: Frequency of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in long-running variants (performance > 1,000,000 seconds)
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation events that belong to cases involving co-author creation (Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission)
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'
